calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julie Oneto in Propria Persona. Joseph Campbell in Propria Persona.

The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.
